title: Cedric Burgher
compiled_truth: Cedric Burgher is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-11-12), Cedric Burgher sent 2 and received 136 emails, totalling 138 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kenneth Lay](people/kenneth-lay) (2), [Jeff Skilling](people/jeff-skilling) (2), [Mark Koenig](people/mark-koenig) (2), [Paula Rieker](people/paula-rieker) (2), [Scott Vonderheide](people/scott-vonderheide) (2).
